code: daycounts:select count i by "d"$time from trades

comment: Each day has at least one trade

code: lastprice1:last exec price from trades where ("d"$time)=days 0
firstprice2:first exec price from trades where ("d"$time)=days 1

comment: Last price day 1 equals first price day 2

code: all 0<exec price from trades where ("d"$time)=last days

comment: Dict has trade and quote keys
